description:
Hi  I’m Rose, a certified nutrition coach and am fascinated by our health and lifestyle. 
My interest in healthy food and nutrition began around few years ago, It has evolved into me wanting to share my passion and knowledge with others to help them gain awareness of nutrition and build a sustainable wellness lifestyle!
It's about MORE than food! It’s about WHY you eat, HOW you eat, WHERE and with WHOM you eat, and how you feel as you eat when it come to food choices. It’s also about overall wellness, which includes water, sleep, stress, and self care! What you put in your body MATTERS!.
I have been physically active from past 5-6 years, by doing 5-6 days a week strength and functional training.  
I love sharing videos about healthy eating tips, nutritious recipes, fitness advice, styling and workouts to help you feel your absolute best.

Contact me : rosemarycp24@gmail.com

description:
Hi, I’m Shelly Marie Redmond, a registered dietitian and the voice behind Skinny Louisiana.

On this channel, I help women (especially 40+) lower blood sugar, reverse prediabetes, and lose weight without extreme diets, food guilt, or giving up real food—yes, even Cajun food.

If you’re tired of confusing nutrition advice, cutting carbs harder, or being told to “just eat less,” you’re in the right place.

On this channel, you’ll learn:
 How to stabilize blood sugar and improve insulin resistance
 Simple, diabetes-friendly recipes that actually taste good
 How protein, fiber, and labs work for results
 Real-life nutrition strategies I use in my clinic

I work with patients managing prediabetes, diabetes, insulin resistance, hormone changes, and weight loss, and I accept insurance for nutrition counseling.

🍽️ Website
https://www.skinnylouisiana.com

📧 Work With Me
Email: shelly@skinnylouisiana.com

This channel is educational and not a substitute for individualized medical advice.
angle_to_take: Lead with discovery around how clinic patients track blood sugar and protein/fiber between visits, how the Skinny Louisiana content library stays accessible, and how women 40+ feel supported without food guilt. Frame the app as a clinical-grade branded patient environment—recipe library, blood-sugar tracking, push reminders for protein targets, private Q&A—premium positioning that extends her clinic without relying on email.

description:
National Nutrition is Canada's biggest online vitamin, supplement and sports nutrition store located in Orillia. For over 25 years we've been giving our local customers the same friendly and knowledgeable service that we now offer online at www.nationalnutrition.ca and now this channel. We are hoping to provide an educational, resourceful and fun place to get your daily health information from the comfort of your own home.

Nationalnutrition.ca is a prominent provider of nutritional supplements in Canada. Vitamins, essential oils, fatty acids, energy bars, mass gainers, and other nutritional products are among our specialties. The supplements are meant to be used for therapeutic purposes. Over the years, we've earned several awards for our work as a nutritionist. In 2014 and 2017, we won national awards for Best Health Food Store in Canada, CHFA Hall of Fame Award, and Best Customer Service. We've also won awards for marketing and the best health food store.
angle_to_take: Start with questions about how Mailchimp list members convert into repeat store customers, how educational content ties back to product pages, and how they compete with Amazon on trust. Frame the app as a branded retail-plus-education environment—product feed, coupon drops, educational videos, push for reorder reminders and sales—zero-CPI retention that Mailchimp alone cannot deliver.

description:
I'm Elaine, a Registered Dietitian, clinic founder, and media dietitian. Here, we tackle everything from practical recipes to evidence-based nutrition for conditions like diabetes and high cholesterol, to the psychology of eating. My specialty is integrating nutrition science with counseling skills to support not just your body, but also your mind and mental well-being. 

我是Elaine，注册营养师、诊所创始人，Youtuber，和媒体营养师。在这里，我们涵盖从实用食谱到针对糖尿病、高胆固醇等疾病的循证营养学，再到饮食心理学的全方位内容。我的专长在于融合营养科学与心理学，建立健康的食物关系，不仅支持您的健康饮食，也关注您的心理健康。
